3129520.name: REYNATIS - Art Book
3129520.description:
"REYNATIS - Art Book" is an 80-page collection featuring rich illustrations the game's immersive world.

Inside, you'll find comprehensive character designs, including intricate costume details and early character concepts. This Art Book also features illustrations with creator commentary, emblem designs, Wizart designs, and boss and enemy concept illustrations, offering a unique glimpse into the creative process.

Enhance your gameplay experience and engross yourself in the intricate and captivating world of REYNATIS with this essential companion!
